overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic open-world game showing a character paddling a wooden canoe across a wide river during golden hour. The scene features dramatic cloud formations, warm backlighting from the setting sun, and rocky cliff formations lining the riverbanks.

scene_state.functional_zone: open river channel between distant cliffs

agents.ego_description: paddling the canoe steadily forward through calm water toward the sun

entered.detail: large rocky cliff formation silhouetted against the sky on the left bank
gentle sloping hills with sparse vegetation on the right bank
bright golden reflection of the setting sun on the water surface
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide river at golden hour, with the camera following a canoe from behind as it paddles toward the setting sun. Distant cliffs line both sides of the river channel, and the water reflects the warm sunlight. The character paddles rhythmically through the calm, open water with no other vessels or people in sight.

scene_state.functional_zone: river passage with approaching rocky shoreline

events.description: canoe begins turning left toward the rocky shoreline on the left bank

agents.ego_description: paddling along the left shoreline, navigating closer to the rocky cliffs while maintaining steady strokes

entered.detail: scattered trees and shrubs growing at the base of the rocky cliff

segments.scene_description: The canoe turns left and approaches the rocky shoreline, bringing the left cliff formation into close view. The character continues paddling along the water's edge where sparse vegetation grows at the cliff base. The right side of the river recedes into the distance as the camera follows the canoe's path along the left bank.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a wide river that shifts from an open-water crossing to a close-up approach along a rocky shoreline. It begins by following a canoe from behind as it paddles rhythmically through calm water toward a setting sun, with distant cliffs framing the horizon and warm light reflecting off the surface. As the canoe turns left, the perspective shifts away from the center of the river, causing the right bank to recede into the distance. The scene then closes in on the left cliff formation, bringing the towering rock face and sparse vegetation at its base into sharp view. Finally, the camera maintains its trail as the character continues paddling closely along the rugged edge of the shoreline.
